libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image, environment variable, or system property is indicated. For 3.1.1, use Maven 3.1/Eclipse Aether types when implementing Maven ProjectBuildingResult or DependencyResolutionResult test doubles; the old 3.0.0 tests' Sonatype Aether return types no longer match those Maven interfaces. Sonatype Aether coverage should target SonatypeAetherFilterTransformer directly, separate from Maven 3.1 project-building interfaces.

deterministic_setup.reason: Overrides the direct 1.4.2 transitive path whose POM requests the nonexistent org.sonatype.sisu:sisu-guice:3.1.0:noaop artifact during Gradle resolution.
The library exposes SonatypeAetherFilterTransformer APIs backed by org.sonatype.aether classes declared as provided in the artifact POM.
Needed with aether-api to instantiate and exercise the Sonatype Aether dependency filters exposed by the library.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8666 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.shared:maven-common-artifact-filters:3.1.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The Sisu override changes an old transitive dependency version, so Gradle and native-image verification remain authoritative.
Existing 3.0.0 tests are not directly portable because Maven 3.1.0 changed relevant dependency-resolution interfaces to Eclipse Aether types.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: 3.1.1 is a Maven Shared component with no Docker or environment needs, but its resolved Gradle graph has a bad old Sisu transitive dependency and its Sonatype Aether transformer uses provided dependencies that the normal scaffold will not receive transitively.
